issues.description: Text states '[Opponent's Turn]' but DSL has no duration field. Must include duration:'DuringOpponentTurn'
Action should be SearchDeck (add up to 1 card from top of deck), not FlipLife. FlipLife is incorrect for this effect
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and PlaySelf action is not supported by card text and appears to be erroneous data
Condition 'HasCardOnBoard:Kuja Pirates' not mentioned in card text. This appears to be incorrect restriction

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Opponent's Turn] [On K.O.] Add up to 1 card from the top of your deck to the top of your Life cards. Then, you take 1 damage.
